data.title: Alfa S.A.B. de C.V. reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Alfa S.A.B. de C.V. press release (OTCPK:ALFFF): Revenues in 3Q25 were $2.422 billion, up 8% year-on-year and 5% quarter-on-quarter.
  • Operating Income was US $179 million in 3Q25.
  • Net Income was US $75 million in 3Q25, compared to US $242 million in the same period of last year.

data.title: Axfood AB (publ) reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Axfood AB (publ) press release (OTCPK:AXFOF): Q3 Net sales increased 6.6% to SEK 22,286 m (20,902).
  • Operating profit amounted to SEK 1,059 m (1,007) including items affecting comparability of SEK -39 m (-). The operating margin was 4.8% (4.8).
  • Adjusted operating profit amounted to SEK 1,099 m (1,007) and the adjusted operating margin to 4.9% (4.8).
  • Net profit for the period amounted to SEK 727 m (715) and earnings per share before dilution to SEK 3.30 (3.26).
  • In September, a dividend of SEK 4.25 per share was paid out, the second part of the shareholder dividend of SEK 8.75 per share (8.50).

data.title: Icade reports total IFRS consolidated revenue of €923M as of Sept 30
data.description:
• Icade (OTCPK:CDMGF): Total IFRS consolidated revenue was €923M as of September 30.
  • 2025 guidance unchanged: Group NCCF of between €3.40 and €3.60 per share.

data.title: Volvo Car AB (publ.) reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Volvo Car AB (publ.) press release (OTCPK:VLVOF): Q3
  • Q3 revenue was SEK 86.4 bn (SEK 92.8 bn in Q3 2024)
  • Q3 operating income was SEK 6.4 bn (SEK 5.8 bn in Q3 2024)
  • Q3 operating income (excl. JVs and associates) was SEK 6.3 bn (SEK 5.7 bn in Q3 2024)
  • Q3 EBIT margin was 7.4 per cent (6.2 per cent in Q3 2024)
  • Q3 EBIT margin (excl. JVs and associates) was 7.2 per cent (6.2 per cent in Q3 2024)
  • Q3 basic earnings per share were 1.75 SEK (1.41 SEK in Q3 2024)
  • Q3 fully electric car sales share at 22 per cent (25 per cent in Q3 2024)
  • Q3 electrified car sales share at 45 per cent (48 per cent in Q3 2024)
  • Volvo Cars reports a group operating income of SEK 6.4 billion and an EBIT margin of 7.4 per cent for the third quarter of 2025.
  • The result was supported by certain one-off items, but a large contributor to the improvement was the effect of the company's ongoing SEK 18 billion cost and cash action plan.

  • Looking ahead

    In the short term, Volvo Cars expects the market to be increasingly challenging, as macroeconomic challenges will remain, including continued price competition and the effects of US import tariffs. 

  • Volvo Cars expects more positive effects from its cost and cash programme in the fourth quarter. 

  • The company is also finalising the major investments in its new product architecture. Thereafter Volvo Cars' investments will reduce significantly, and the company will maintain strict capital discipline within affordable frameworks.

data.title: Stillfront Group AB (publ) reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Stillfront Group AB (publ) press release (OTCPK:STLFF): Q3 Net revenue of SEK 1,373 (1,595) million decreased by 8 (-1) percent organically.
  • Gross margin of 83 (80) percent, an increase of 3 (2) percentage points.
  • Adjusted EBITDAC of SEK 436 (385) million increased by 13 (-6) percent.
  • Adjusted EBITDAC margin of 32 (24) percent, an increase of 8 percentage points.
  • Net results of SEK 55 (18) million.
  • Free cash flow amounted to SEK 183 (298) million, and for the last 12 months amounted to SEK 974 (835) million.
  • Total net debt, including cash earnout for the next 12 months, amounted to SEK 4,381 (4,745) million.
  • Cash position was SEK 773 (857) million and SEK 1,354 (1,783) million of undrawn credit facilities.

data.title: MercadoLibre partners with Casas Bahia in key Brazil e-commerce deal
data.description:
MercadoLibre (NASDAQ:MELI) struck a deal on Thursday with Grupo Casas Bahia (OTCPK:VIAYY) aimed at boosting e-commerce in Brazil. The partnership will make Casas Bahia's (OTCPK:VIAYY) core portfolio, which includes home appliances, electronics, and furniture, available on MercadoLibre's (NASDAQ:MELI) e-commerce platform, according to a regulatory filing.

The partnership leverages MercadoLibre's (MELI) extensive reach and technology alongside Casas Bahia's (OTCPK:VIAYY) strong retail presence, potentially reshaping the e-commerce landscape in Brazil through enhanced product accessibility and market reach. The strategic alliance is also seen as marking a new phase in competition within the broad Latin American digital market. 

Following the announcement, Casas Bahia (OTCPK:VIAYY) rose more than 5% in São Paulo trading. MercadoLibre (MELI) edged 0.5% higher in the U.S.

data.title: Alsea, S.A.B. de C.V. reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Alsea, S.A.B. de C.V. press release (OTCPK:ALSSF): Net sales in the third quarter of 2025 increased 5.7% reaching $21,029 million pesos.
  • Net income increased by 559.0% in the third quarter, reaching $512 million pesos.

data.title: Elisa Oyj reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Elisa Oyj press release (OTCPK:ELMUF): Q3 Revenue increased by 5 per cent, or EUR 25m, to EUR 561m.
  • Comparable EBITDA grew by 4 per cent, or EUR 8m, to EUR 214m.
  • Comparable EBIT increased by 2 per cent, or EUR 3m, to EUR 139m.
  • Comparable cash flow increased by 12 per cent, or EUR 13m, to EUR 125m.
  • Outlook and guidance for 2025:
  • Full-year revenue is estimated to be at the same level as or slightly higher than in 2024. Mobile, digital and software services are expected to increase revenue.
  • Full-year comparable EBITDA is anticipated to be at the same level as or slightly higher than in 2024. Capital expenditure is expected to be a maximum of 12 per cent of revenue.

data.title: Essity AB (publ) GAAP EPS of SEK4.86, revenue of SEK34.64M
data.description:
• Essity AB (publ) press release (OTCPK:ETTYF): Q3 GAAP EPS of SEK4.86.
  • Revenue of SEK34.64M.

data.title: Huhtamäki Oyj reports Q3 results
data.description:
• Huhtamäki Oyj press release (OTCPK:HOYFF): Q3 the company reported net sales of Rs. 6,049M representing a 4.7% decrease compared to the corresponding period of last year.
  • The company reported EBIT before exceptional items at Rs. 521 million, which represents a substantial increase of 172.1% compared to the corresponding period of last year.
  • For the 9-months period ended Sep 2025, the company has reported sales of INR 17,899 million, representing a decrease of 3.2% compared to the corresponding period of previous year.
  • The company reported EBIT before exceptional item at Rs. 1,253 million representing an increase of 47% compared to corresponding period of previous year.
